summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of refactored Interventions pages. All shared components (useStockBrowser, CascadingFilters, StockResultsTable, InterventionFormFields, interventionHelpers) are working correctly in both Admin and Light Client pages. The refactoring successfully extracted duplicated code while maintaining identical functionality.
passed_tests: Admin login with email/password works correctly
Admin Interventions page loads with table (Date/Heure, MRN, Date naissance, Produits, Statut columns)
Admin filter buttons (Aujourd'hui, Cette semaine, Toutes) work and show active state
Admin Calendar date range popover opens with 2-month view
Admin 'Nouvelle intervention' button opens create modal
Admin create modal: InterventionFormFields shows datetime, MRN, birthdate fields
Admin create modal: CascadingFilters shows 3 columns (Catégorie, Modèle, Spécification)
Admin create modal: StockResultsTable shows products with Description, N° de série, Stock columns
Admin create modal: Cascading filter selection updates related columns
Admin create modal: Submit and Cancel buttons work
Admin intervention row click opens detail panel
Admin detail panel: Shows products with resolution badges (Produit, Catégorie, etc.)
Admin detail panel: Edit button (pencil) opens edit modal
Admin detail panel: Delete button opens confirmation dialog
Admin edit modal: InterventionFormFields shows datetime, MRN, birthdate with existing values
Admin edit modal: Save and Cancel buttons work
Admin delete confirmation: Shows warning message with Annuler/Supprimer buttons
Admin detail panel: CascadingFilters for adding products works
Admin detail panel: StockResultsTable with add buttons works
Light Client PIN login (1234 + Confirmer) works
Light Client Interventions page loads with dark theme (slate-900 bg)
Light Client date navigation (prev/next arrows, Aujourd'hui) works
Light Client action buttons (Mise en stock, PICKING, + Intervention) visible
Light Client intervention list shows MRN, birth date, product count
Light Client edit button (pencil) on each intervention works
Light Client '+ Intervention' button opens create modal with dark theme
Light Client create modal: InterventionFormFields with dark styling
Light Client create modal: CascadingFilters with dark theme
Light Client create modal: StockResultsTable with dark theme
Light Client create modal: Cascading filter selection works (Category -> Model -> Specification)
Light Client create modal: 'Add at filter level' button shows selected filter path
Light Client create modal: Reset button works
Light Client create modal: Adding product from stock results works
Light Client edit modal: Opens with existing intervention data
Light Client edit modal: Shows products with resolution badges
Light Client edit modal: Delete button opens confirmation dialog
Light Client delete confirmation: Dark themed with Annuler/Supprimer buttons
seed_data_creation: None - used existing intervention data for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactoring of shared components for Interventions pages is complete and verified. Key shared components: 1) useStockBrowser.js - custom hook for stock browser state management. 2) interventionHelpers.js - getPartialLabel, getResolutionBadge, statusColors, statusLabels. 3) CascadingFilters.jsx - 3-column cascading filter with dark prop. 4) StockResultsTable.jsx - product results table with dark prop. 5) InterventionFormFields.jsx - form fields (datetime, MRN, birthdate) with dark prop. Both Admin (light theme) and Light Client (dark theme) pages use these shared components correctly.

useStockBrowser.functionality: Stock browser state management (filters, results, loading)

StockResultsTable.functionality: Product results table with serial numbers and add buttons

InterventionFormFields.functionality: Form fields for datetime, MRN, birth date

light_client_interventions.intervention_list: Shows MRN, birth date, product count with edit button
